zh.lifeSummary: 當Elizabeth Pratt於1602年10月10日出生在英國瓦維其可爾瓦爾斯格拉福 奧 索維時，她的父親Dennis Pratt42歲，母親Anne38歲。她於1623年8月18日與Thomas Lygon II在英國瓦維其可爾結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她於1623年住在英國北愛爾蘭庫迪 阿馬格阿馬格卡勒頓。她去世於1631年8月19日在英國瓦維其可爾瓦爾斯格拉福 奧 索維享年28歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭韋斯特 米德藍茲瓦爾斯格拉福 奧 索維。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Elizabeth Pratt于1602年10月10日出生在英国瓦維其可爾瓦爾斯格拉福 奧 索維时，她的父亲Dennis Pratt42岁，母亲Anne38岁。她于1623年8月18日与Thomas Lygon II在英国瓦維其可爾结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她于1623年住在英国北爱尔兰庫迪 阿馬格阿馬格卡勒頓。她去世于1631年8月19日在英国瓦維其可爾瓦爾斯格拉福 奧 索維享年28岁，埋葬在英国英格兰韋斯特 米德藍茲瓦爾斯格拉福 奧 索維。

nameMeanings.name: Pratt
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: nickname for a clever trickster, from Middle English prat(te), pret ‘cunning, wily, astute’ (a derivative of Old English præt, pret ‘trickery, deception’, which is found in use as a byname in the 11th century). This surname is quite common in southeastern Ireland.

variants.name: Pretty
meanings: English: nickname from Middle English pratti, prettie, pritti ‘crafty, cunning’ (Old English prættig, prettig). Compare Pratt .

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

en.lifeSummary: When Elizabeth Pratt was born on 10 October 1602, in Walsgrave on Sowe, Warwickshire, England, her father, Dennis Pratt, was 42 and her mother, Anne, was 38. She married Thomas Lygon II on 18 August 1623, in Warwickshire, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. She lived in Caledon, Armagh, County Armagh, Northern Ireland, United Kingdom in 1623. She died on 19 August 1631, in Walsgrave on Sowe, Warwickshire, England, at the age of 28, and was buried in Walsgrave on Sowe, West Midlands, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Elizabeth Pratt est née le 10 octobre 1602, à Walsgrave on Sowe, Warwickshire, Angleterre, son père, Dennis Pratt, avait 42 ans et sa mère, Anne, avait 38 ans. Elle a épousé Thomas Lygon II le 18 août 1623, à Warwickshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. Elle a vécu à Caledon, Armagh, County Armagh, Irlande du Nord, Royaume-Uni en 1623. Elle est décédée le 19 août 1631, à Walsgrave on Sowe, Warwickshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 28 ans, et a été enterrée à Walsgrave on Sowe, West Midlands, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Elizabeth Pratt am 10. Oktober 1602 in Walsgrave on Sowe, Warwickshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Dennis Pratt 42 und ihre Mutter Anne 38. Sie hat am 18. August 1623 in Warwickshire, England Thomas Lygon II geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. 1623 hat sie in Caledon, Armagh, County Armagh, Nordirland, United Kingdom gelebt. Sie starb am 19. August 1631 im Alter von 28 Jahren in Walsgrave on Sowe, Warwickshire, England und wurde in Walsgrave on Sowe, West Midlands, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Pratt è nata il il 10 ottobre 1602 nel Walsgrave on Sowe, Warwickshire, England, sua padre, Dennis Pratt, aveva 42 anni e sua madre, Anne, aveva 38 anni. Lei sposato Thomas Lygon II il 18 agosto 1623, nel Warwickshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie. Vissuto a Caledon, Armagh, County Armagh, Irlanda del Nord, Regno Unito nel 1623. Morì il 19 agosto 1631, nel Walsgrave on Sowe, Warwickshire, England, all'età di 28 anni, e fu sepolta a Walsgrave on Sowe, West Midlands, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.Walsgrave on Sowe, Metropolitan Borough: イギリスイギリスワーウィクシュアイアワルスグラブ オン ソウ
ja.Warwickshire, England: ジンバブエミドランズグウエルワーウィクシュアイア
ja.Caledon, Armagh, County Armagh, Northern: イギリス北アイルランドコウントイ アルマグアルマグケイレドン
ja.Gloucestershire, England: イギリスグロウセステルシュアイア
ja.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Prattが1602年10月10日にイギリスワーウィクシュアイアワルスグラブ オン ソウで生まれた時，父Dennis Prattは42歳，母Anneは38歳であった。1623年8月18日にイギリスワーウィクシュアイアでThomas Lygon IIと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1623年にはイギリス北アイルランドコウントイ アルマグアルマグケイレドンに住んでいた。彼女は1631年8月19日にイギリスワーウィクシュアイアワルスグラブ オン ソウで28歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスウエスト ミドランズワルスグラブ オン ソウにて埋葬された。

ko.St Mary Churchyard, Walsgrave on Sowe, M: 영국 잉글랜드 웨스트 미들랜드즈 월스그레이브  소베
ko.Caledon, Armagh, County Armagh, Northern: 영국 북아일랜드 카운티 아마그h 아마그h 캘던
ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Pratt(이)가 1602년 10월 10일 영국 워윅실르 월스그레이브  소베에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Dennis Pratt(은)는 42세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Anne(은)는 38세였다. 그녀는 1623년 8월 18일 영국 워윅실르에서 Thomas Lygon II(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 1623년도에 영국 북아일랜드 카운티 아마그h 아마그h 캘던에서 살았다. 그녀는 1631년 8월 19일 영국 워윅실르 월스그레이브  소베에서 28세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 웨스트 미들랜드즈 월스그레이브  소베에 묻혔다.

pt.10 October 1602–19 August 1631: 10 de outubro de 1602–19 de agosto de 1631
pt.Coventry, West Midlands, England: Coventry, West Midlands, Inglaterra, United Kingdom
pt.Stoke-Biggin, Walsgrave on Sowe, Warwick: Walsgrave on Sowe, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom

pt.Caledon, Armagh, County Armagh, Northern: Caledon, Armagh, County Armagh, Irlanda do Norte, United Kingdom
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Pratt nasceu em 10 de outubro de 1602, em Walsgrave on Sowe, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Dennis Pratt, tinha 42 anos e sua mãe, Anne, tinha 38 anos. Ela casou-se com Thomas Lygon II em 18 de agosto de 1623, em Warwickshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela viveu em Caledon, Armagh, County Armagh, Irlanda do Norte, United Kingdom em 1623. Ela faleceu em 19 de agosto de 1631, em Walsgrave on Sowe, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, com 28 anos, e foi sepultada em Walsgrave on Sowe, West Midlands, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.Caledon, Armagh, County Armagh, Northern: кеиледон, армаг, коунти армаг, Северная Ирландия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elizabeth Pratt родилась 10 октября 1602 г. в местности валсграв он соу, варвиккшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Dennis Pratt было 42 года, а матери, которую звали Anne, 38. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Thomas Lygon II 18 августа 1623 г. в местности варвиккшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. Она жила в местности кеиледон, армаг, коунти армаг, Северная Ирландия, Великобритания в 1623 году. Она умерла 19 августа 1631 г. в местности валсграв он соу, варвиккшир, Англия в возрасте 28 лет и была похоронена в местности валсграв он соу, вест мидландс, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Elizabeth Pratt nació el 10 de octubre de 1602, en Walsgrave on Sowe, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Dennis Pratt, tenía 42 años y su mamá, Anne, tenía 38 años. Se casó con Thomas Lygon II el 18 de agosto de 1623, en Warwickshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 2 hijas. Vivió en Caledon, Armagh, County Armagh, Irlanda del Norte, Reino Unido en 1623. Murió el 19 de agosto de 1631, en Walsgrave on Sowe, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 28 años, y fue sepultada en Walsgrave on Sowe, West Midlands, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
